# TecnoLTS - Enterprise IT Solutions

> Professional IT services for modern businesses, specializing in software development, cybersecurity, and infrastructure.

## Core Services
- **Software Development**: Custom solutions, web and mobile apps.
- **Monitoring & Observability**: Real-time insights using OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, and Zabbix.
- **Cybersecurity**: Enterprise protection, ransomware defense, and ISO 27001 readiness.
- **Network Solutions**: Infrastructure design and management.
- **Business Continuity**: Backup, disaster recovery, and licensing.

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://tecnolts.com
- **Email**: info@tecnolts.com
- **Location**: Quito, Ecuador

For detailed service descriptions, technical implementation details, and company background, see [llms-full.txt](https://tecnolts.com/llms-full.txt).
